floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: prologue pair-flip may fall out of clean C via sched1 critical-path ordering (offsets read feeds the entry branch); tombstone-vs-2026-07-06-line tension flagged for ruling

frontier.hypothesis: Clean form: delete both renames, use `base`/`offsets` directly (offsets as the walked pointer, base raw), keep the derived locals and the loop-entered block; sched1 may order a1's callee-save copy first naturally because the *offsets load feeds the entry branch (critical path). Measure before assuming the wall.
frontier.mechanism: sched1 priority scheduling of the two independent arg-copy insns (longest-path-to-branch) + save_restore_insns/prologue_fix pairing
frontier.next_probe: apply clean form -> sandbox hirahira_w_frie --disable all; inspect whether the residual diff is exactly the 2-pair prologue order or zero

frontier.hypothesis: If the pair order regresses: initializer/statement-order geometry sweep - make the *offsets read the lexically-first executable statement, push all base-derived initializers (slots=base+1, dest=base+base[1]) after it, and vary which decls carry initializers vs plain assignments; also sweep `stop` respellings (loop-entered block const vs FAKE-annotated holder).
frontier.mechanism: RTL emission order of decl initializers biasing sched1's tie-break on the copy pair
frontier.next_probe: tools/sweep_variants.py over 4-6 ordering variants; attribute the diff per variant to the prologue pair vs the s7 materialization

frontier.hypothesis: If geometry exhausts: surface the tombstone-vs-2026-07-06-line question - literal param renames are semantically-true named intermediates under the new construct-honesty line, so a FAKE-annotated alias pair may now be reviewable where the 2026-06-02 tombstone auto-FAILed it (same disposition would unlock the parked func_8007C2A0/C4B8 twins).
frontier.mechanism: policy resolution, not codegen - the construct already byte-matches
frontier.next_probe: write the exhaustion ledger from probes 1-2, then raise the ruling question with both rules cited

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Two constructs violate the SOTN bar; primary is a confirmed param-local-alias-prologue-pair-flip (explicitly forbidden). Worker must produce a clean pure-C body that matches the prologue without aliasing the parameters in reverse order.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
